label: Neutral
explanation: 6/10 is neutral from a 7-day headline keyword scan. Bullish drivers: Dow Hits Record High, Nasdaq And S&P 500 Jump On US-Iran Deal And SpaceX Optimism — SPCX, NVDA, ROKU, CRM, AMZN In Focus; Wall Street rallies, Dow ends with record on US-Iran deal. Bearish offsets: Stocks leap worldwide, and oil prices drop after the US and Iran reach a tentative deal on their war - ABC Columbia; Wall Street indexes fall more than 1 percent, hit by tech, Iran war worries - Jefferson City News Tribune.
